strategic_objective: Clarify whether near-constant bulk feature values reflect true network saturation or data artifacts and assess their impact on subtle attack-related variations.
key_checks: Measure temporal stability of low cardinality in bulk features
Compare bulk feature distributions across attack and benign classes
Assess sensitivity of bulk features to minor traffic fluctuations
Check for potential masking of relevant signals by near-constant values
success_criteria: Evidence supports bulk features as stable saturation indicators or reveals artifact patterns
Identification of any subtle but meaningful variations within near-constant bulk features
Clear differentiation between genuine network behavior and data collection effects
router_constraints: preserve evidence references e23 to e32
